'''âv-t-y''' ('''kavatay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cocapture|cocapture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cocapture|cocapture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-t-y
|-
! Lemma
| kavatay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivatay|thivatay]] || [[word:jivatay|jivatay]] || [[word:shivatay|shivatay]] || [[word:kivatay|kivatay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvatay|thuthuvatay]] || [[word:jujuvatay|jujuvatay]] || [[word:shushuvatay|shushuvatay]] || [[word:kukuvatay|kukuvatay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvatay|thuvatay]] || [[word:juvatay|juvatay]] || [[word:shuvatay|shuvatay]] || [[word:kuvatay|kuvatay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvatay|thuvatay]] || [[word:juvatay|juvatay]] || [[word:shuvatay|shuvatay]] || [[word:kuvatay|kuvatay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevatay|thevatay]] || [[word:jevatay|jevatay]] || [[word:shevatay|shevatay]] || [[word:kevatay|kevatay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovatay|thothovatay]] || [[word:jojovatay|jojovatay]] || [[word:shoshovatay|shoshovatay]] || [[word:kokovatay|kokovatay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovatay|thovatay]] || [[word:jovatay|jovatay]] || [[word:shovatay|shovatay]] || [[word:kovatay|kovatay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovatay|thovatay]] || [[word:jovatay|jovatay]] || [[word:shovatay|shovatay]] || [[word:kovatay|kovatay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvatay|thĂŠvatay]] || [[word:jĂŠvatay|jĂŠvatay]] || [[word:shĂŠvatay|shĂŠvatay]] || [[word:kĂŠvatay|kĂŠvatay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavatay|thathavatay]] || [[word:jajavatay|jajavatay]] || [[word:shashavatay|shashavatay]] || [[word:kakavatay|kakavatay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavatay|thavatay]] || [[word:javatay|javatay]] || [[word:shavatay|shavatay]] || [[word:kavatay|kavatay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavatay|thavatay]] || [[word:javatay|javatay]] || [[word:shavatay|shavatay]] || [[word:kavatay|kavatay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavatay|shavatay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavatay|goshavatay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavatay|gokishavatay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavataynĂŒ|shavataynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavataynknĂŒ|goshavataynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavataynĂŒ|gokishavataynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavatayshĂ«|shavatayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavataynkshĂ«|goshavataynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavatayshĂ«|gokishavatayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavatayro|shavatayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataynkro|goshavataynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavatayro|gokishavatayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavataymu|shavataymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataynkmu|goshavataynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavataymu|gokishavataymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavataysher|shavataysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavataynksher|goshavataynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavataysher|gokishavataysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavatayng|shavatayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavataynkng|goshavataynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavatayng|gokishavatayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavataya|shavataya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavataynkya|goshavataynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavataya|gokishavataya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavatayam|shavatayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavataynkyam|goshavataynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavatayam|gokishavatayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavataynĂŒshĂ«|shavataynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavataynknĂŒshĂ«|goshavataynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavataynĂŒshĂ«|gokishavataynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavataynĂŒro|shavataynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataynknĂŒro|goshavataynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavataynĂŒro|gokishavataynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavataynĂŒmu|shavataynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataynknĂŒmu|goshavataynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavataynĂŒmu|gokishavataynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavatayshĂ«nĂŒ|shavatayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavataynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavataynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavatayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavatayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavatayshĂ«ro|shavatayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataynkshĂ«ro|goshavataynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavatayshĂ«ro|gokishavatayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavatayshĂ«mu|shavatayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataynkshĂ«mu|goshavataynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavatayshĂ«mu|gokishavatayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavatayronĂŒ|shavatayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavataynkronĂŒ|goshavataynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavatayronĂŒ|gokishavatayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavatayroshĂ«|shavatayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavataynkroshĂ«|goshavataynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavatayroshĂ«|gokishavatayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavatayromu|shavatayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavataynkromu|goshavataynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavatayromu|gokishavatayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavataymunĂŒ|shavataymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavataynkmunĂŒ|goshavataynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavataymunĂŒ|gokishavataymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavataymushĂ«|shavataymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavataynkmushĂ«|goshavataynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavataymushĂ«|gokishavataymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavataymuro|shavataymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavataynkmuro|goshavataynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavataymuro|gokishavataymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
